style_a.name: 港片复古胶片
style_a.prompt_suffix: Wong Kar-wai style, high contrast, heavy film grain, red and green neon glow, warm yellow tones, anamorphic lens, claustrophobic framing, Hong Kong retro 1990s aesthetic

style_b.name: 茶山奇幻古风
style_b.prompt_suffix: lush green tea mountain, ethereal mist, golden sunrise, traditional Chinese fantasy, flowing hanfu robes, vibrant saturated colors, epic aerial landscape, dreamy oriental mythology

music_sync.lyrics: 指尖敲碎一行行的代码 / 变成发光的茶叶飞出屏幕

atmosphere.overall_mood: 键盘疯狂敲击→代码变异成发光茶叶→Glitch效果墙壁剥落→绿色能量涌入——穿越开始
atmosphere.lighting: CRT绿光增强→发光茶叶的青绿色光→绿色能量光柱

video_prompt: Frantic keyboard typing matching drum beats, code on CRT transforms into glowing tea leaves that fly out of the screen, room undergoes digital glitch effects with walls peeling to reveal green light, transition from Hong Kong retro to fantasy, 16:9, 15s.

bgm.description: 前副歌——节奏骤然加速，鼓点密集如键盘敲击
bgm.mood: 紧张、爆发前兆、超自然力量涌入
bgm.instruments: 电子鼓卡点、glitch音效、弦乐急速上行

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 主角回到桌前——双手疯狂敲击键盘，每一次按键都精准卡在鼓点上
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 键盘如鼓——代码与音乐同步
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 高速机械键盘连击声、卡鼓点
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Close-up of a man frantically typing on a mechanical keyboard in a dark Hong Kong apartment, his fingers hammering the keys with intense energy, each keystroke synchronized with drum beats, CRT screen blazing with scrolling code, sweat on his brow, Wong Kar-wai manic energy, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: CRT屏幕特写——代码行开始异变，字符扭曲变形，绿色代码逐渐发出不自然的光芒
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 代码不再是代码——某种力量在觉醒
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Extreme close-up of a CRT monitor screen where green code characters are mutating and distorting, the text warping and glowing with an unnatural bright cyan-green light, digital artifacts and scan lines visible, something supernatural happening to the data, glitch aesthetic meeting Wong Kar-wai, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: CRT屏幕中的代码字符开始脱离屏幕——变成一片片发光的绿色茶叶形态，缓缓飘出屏幕表面
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 代码蜕变为茶叶——数字世界与自然奇幻的交汇点
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 清脆的晶体化声音、茶叶沙沙声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Close-up of a CRT monitor screen where green code characters are detaching from the screen surface and morphing into glowing cyan-green tea leaves floating out of the monitor into the air, code-to-leaf transformation particles, magical digital metamorphosis, Wong Kar-wai meets fantasy, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 发光茶叶越来越多——从屏幕中涌出，在房间中旋转飞舞，主角震惊后仰
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 茶叶风暴在房间中形成——超自然力量不可控
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 大量叶片飞舞声、风声涌起
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Medium shot of a man recoiling in shock as hundreds of glowing cyan-green tea leaves pour out of a CRT monitor and swirl around the Hong Kong apartment room, leaves spinning in spiral patterns, the man silhouetted against the supernatural green glow, Wong Kar-wai supernatural moment, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: Glitch效果开始——画面出现数字噪点条纹，墙壁像游戏纹理一样开始剥落碎裂
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 现实世界像数据一样崩解——Glitch美学
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Hong Kong apartment with digital glitch effects, walls cracking and peeling like corrupted textures in a video game revealing green light beneath, horizontal scan line distortions across the image, the man standing in the center as reality fractures around him, glowing tea leaves swirling, cyberpunk glitch meets Wong Kar-wai, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 墙壁完全剥落——露出底下翠绿色的能量光壁，绿色光芒从裂缝中涌入房间
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 旧世界完全崩塌——绿色能量世界显露
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 墙壁崩裂的巨响、能量嗡鸣
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Hong Kong apartment walls completely peeled away revealing vibrant green energy walls of light underneath, emerald green luminous energy pouring through the cracks, a man standing with arms spread embracing the transformation, room becoming a portal of green light, glowing tea leaves everywhere, spectacular digital-to-fantasy transition, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 发光茶叶汇聚成龙卷风围绕主角旋转——茶叶风暴越来越快，主角的旧西装在风中飘动
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 茶叶龙卷风——穿越的通道正在形成
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 龙卷风呼啸声、茶叶高速旋转声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A man standing at the center of a tornado of glowing green tea leaves spinning around him at high speed, his vintage suit flapping in the supernatural wind, the tea leaf vortex creating a cylindrical portal of green light, the apartment dissolving into the vortex, epic transformation moment, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 茶叶风暴旋转到极速——主角的西装开始碎散化为粒子，露出底下白色的古装轮廓

characters.name: 创作者A
characters.action: 衣服正在蜕变，西装碎散

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 肉身蜕变——港风程序员→茶山侠客
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 织物碎裂声、能量转化嗡鸣
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A man in the eye of a green tea leaf tornado, his vintage western suit disintegrating into particles, underneath a white flowing traditional Chinese warrior robe beginning to materialize, the clothing transformation showing both styles briefly overlapping, green glowing particles everywhere, dramatic metamorphosis, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 强光闪白——茶叶风暴达到顶点后瞬间爆发，一切被吞没在翠绿色的强光中
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 穿越完成——旧世界的最后一帧
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 巨大的能量释放声→瞬间寂静
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Blinding explosion of green light as a tea leaf tornado reaches its climax, the entire frame engulfed in brilliant emerald-white overexposure, the silhouette of a figure barely visible dissolving into pure green light energy, the old world ending in a flash of supernatural green brilliance, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio
